title: Mystery Source Behind Trump's July 8 UFO Speech Claim Allegedly Leaked in New Interview
description: A new interview sheds light on the mysterious source behind claims that Donald Trump prepared a July 8 UFO disclosure speech, with speculation pointing towards billionaire researcher Robert Bigelow.

title: Public alarm as man linked to UFO research disappears
description: Federal and military agencies intensified the search for retired Air Force Maj. Gen. William Neil McCasland after he disappeared from his Albuquerque home.

title: Mysterious trio of lights 'chasing each other' spotted over New York City in eerie UFO sighting
description: A swarm of strange lights over a New York City neighborhood have opened up a new mystery as speculation about UFOs continues to grow.

title: State rep wants state to create a UFO study center
description: The bill is co-sponsored by Rep. Aundre Bumgardner, D-41st District.

title: Retired Air Force Major General with Links to UFO Researcher Goes Missing - Search Underway
description: A retired Air Force major general who once commanded a base linked in folklore to UFOs has been missing for two weeks, and now the FBI is involved in the [...]The post Retired Air Force Major General with Links to UFO Researcher Goes Missing - Search Underway appeared first on The Western Journal.
